title: Business Development Executive (Freelancer) (Ref:GKK)
description:
Job Descriptions & Requirements

Are you looking to take your career to new heights in a company that truly values people, growth, and impact?

At Celecti, we do more than just recruitment - we build lasting careers and connect talent with opportunity. If you're driven, people-oriented, we want you on our team!

We’re hiring Business Development Executive (Freelance) who are passionate about making a real impact through meaningful work.

Why Join Us?

  • You define your own earning potential — a fully commission-based model that rewards your performance, ambition, and results.
  • Flexible working hours — manage your own time and set your own targets.
  • Comprehensive training and mentorship to support your success.
  • A supportive, collaborative team culture that celebrates growth.
  • Continuous learning and development opportunities to help you excel.

What You’ll Do

  • Identify and target high-value clients and priority markets.
  • Drive new client acquisition while strengthening long-term retention.
  • Build and maintain strong client relationships through effective business development and account management.
  • Design and implement repeatable, scalable business development strategies.

What We’re Looking For

  • A Diploma or degree in any discipline
  • A positive attitude, strong initiative, and self-driven
  • Tech-savvy

Ready to Make a Difference?

If you’re seeking flexibility and a rewarding career with real growth, purpose, and impact, we’d love to meet you.

Email your resume in MS Word format to hr@celecti.com.sg

Let’s grow together — at Celecti.

Lim Swee Kim (Ms.) | CEI Reg.: No. No: R1103707 | Director | Mobile: 9011 1145 | Office Mainline.: 6385 6696

postedCompany.description:
Celecti is a forward thinking recruitment firm working across a wide range of industries and sectors. In Celecti, we understand how to fill the “talent” gap for you. To secure the “right” fit so that your organization continues to grow and stay ahead of the competition.

Organization that continues to grow and stay ahead have something in common: attracting and retaining the very best talent. Even having a robust talent acquisition strategy and a team of in-house experts, finding the right talents in a fiercely competitive world can be as challenging as looking for a needle in a hack.

Job seekers that wish to successfully nail down the right job have to do one thing: be the right fit. Unless they are working closely with recruiting experts that keep their finger on the job market’s pulse, securing a job offer can take longer than expected.

The presence of CELECTI, is to fill the gap.
postedCompany.name: CELECTI PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
